---
title: TITLE
date: YYYY-MM-DD
categories: ["Announcement", "Awards/Recognition", "Call for Application", "Event Highlights", "Interviews", "Job Ads", "New Members", "Newsletters", "Publications", "Reports"]
description: A brief description of the news item that will appear in the news card on the main News page. Keep it concise and engaging to attract readers. MAX 2-3 SENTENCES.
flyer:
    - file: "FLYER FILE PATH"   # e.g. "images/event_flyer.pdf"
      title: "FLYER TITLE"  # This should be a descriptive title--it will be used for screenreaders and as the link text for the flyer. e.g. "Event Flyer PDF"

template: templates/news-template.html
filters:
  - templates/process-news-yaml.lua
---
